headline: AI and bots have officially taken over the internet, report finds
summary: HUMAN Security's State of AI Traffic report found that bots have eclipsed human users, with automated traffic growing eight times faster than human activity.

headline: Intel CrowdStrike AI PC Alliance Puts Security And Valuation In Focus
summary: Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC) has expanded its collaboration with CrowdStrike to strengthen cybersecurity on Intel-powered AI PCs. The partnership focuses on real-time threat detection and data protection by combining Intel CPUs, GPUs, and NPUs with CrowdStrike’s adversary intelligence. The move targets enterprise endpoints as AI workloads increasingly run directly on user devices. Intel, trading at $47.18, has seen its share price return 19.8% year to date and 101.5% over the past year, while the...

headline: IBM Expands AI Agents And Security Role With ElevenLabs And CrowdStrike
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) has partnered with ElevenLabs to bring secure, multilingual voice AI agents to enterprise clients through its watsonx Orchestrate platform. The collaboration aims to support natural language AI interactions in more than 70 languages for global businesses with strict compliance needs. IBM also expanded its partnership with CrowdStrike to deliver AI powered, autonomous threat detection and response across security and IT environments. Both developments align with IBM's ongoing...
